pr.title: WIP: Depth Recurrence — val_bpb 3.2134 (beats baseline by 0.014 BPB at 2.8x fewer params)

output.summary: Weight-shared transformer blocks iterate multiple times with learned iteration conditioning and U-Net skips to reach 20+ effective layers under 16MB.
techniques: Weight-shared transformer blocks run recurrently to multiply effective depth
Learned iteration embeddings with sigmoid gating per pass
U-Net-inspired skip connections spanning the recurrent depth
